steals.detail: They position as 'founder-piloted' — engine does the work, founder keeps the one approval that matters. Far better than 'self-serve' or 'fully automated.' Nebula should reframe $97 implementation as 'founder-piloted' — we diagnose, you approve, we fix.

'Let's get the awkward part out of the way first. You've seen a hundred posts promising AI that books meetings. You're skeptical. Good.' Directly addresses the #1 objection before pitching. Nebula audit.html should open with: 'You've spent $X on ads with zero sales. You're skeptical of another audit tool. Good.'
Orgs are commodities — anyone can buy them. The wiring between them is the moat. Nebula can contrast 'tools vs system' similarly: 'A CRO tool is a drill. We deliver the finished house.'

Interactive 'what is it costing you' tool: 5 tools × 3hrs/day × $70k/yr. Nebula should build an 'ad spend leak calculator' — enter monthly spend, get back $X wasted on non-converting pages. Could be lead gen asset.

Every send makes the system smarter. 'Your competitors' outbound gets old. Yours gets smarter.' Nebula needs: 'Every audit sharpens the next one. Our diagnosis gets more precise with every page we analyze.'

Each of their 7 layers starts with 'Replaces: [tool name].' Concrete substitution framing. 'Anyone can buy the organs. We sell the wiring.' Nebula's offer ladder should replace specific tools per tier.
'3 partners/quarter because depth doesn't scale.' Honest framing. Nebula's $997 Growth Launch should use: 'We take 3 implementations/week because we ship the code ourselves.'

FAQ answers 'Is it really fully autonomous?' with 'No — and that's the point.' Turns objection into advantage. Nebula should answer 'Do I need to be technical?' with 'No — send us your URL. We send the fix.'

nebula_advantage: Specific landing page diagnosis (not generic outbound)

action_items.action: Reframe audit landing page — open with objection
Build ad spend leak calculator as lead gen asset
Add 'every audit sharpens the next one' moat claim
